exhibits.title: Medical GAN Research
exhibits.description: Synthesizing Dual-Energy Subtracted (DES) phantoms from low-energy mammograms using Pix2Pix GANs. Also developed an explainable multi-view Breast Cancer Diagnosis system via 8 CESM views + Grad-CAM.

exhibits.title: Car Damage Assessment
exhibits.description: Engineered an end-to-end damage classification system using a custom dataset of 2,300 vehicle images. Optimized model performance from 57% to 80% accuracy by transitioning from EfficientNet-B0 to a ResNet backbone.

exhibits.title: AI & ML Academic Profile
exhibits.philosophy: Effective teaching must bridge theory and practice. Emphasizing hands-on implementation and real-world datasets.
exhibits.impact: Mentored students for internships, conducted workshops in government schools for non-technical students.

exhibits.title: RAG-Based AI Agent Architect
exhibits.description: Built a Conversational AI chatbot utilizing Python, Gemini API, and Gradio. Engineered multi-step prompt reasoning pipelines via rigorous RLHF evaluations at Outlier AI.
